landingPage.aboutMeContent: Software engineer with a completed Game Developer degree (MBO 4, Mediacollege Amsterdam) and a propaedeutic diploma in HBO-ICT Software Engineering from the Hogeschool van Amsterdam. After completing my first year, I made the deliberate choice to enter the industry — driven by the realization that I learn fastest through real-world experience and hands-on work. I'm passionate about building clean, interactive applications across the full stack, and I'm always looking for new challenges to sharpen my skills. Currently open to opportunities where I can grow, contribute, and make an impact.
